disclosure_label: Northset contributed this fix and ran its declared checks. Contributor self-run. Not maintainer verification.
commands_declared: npm run compile-typescript && npm run test-unit
limitations: Contributor self-run record of Northset’s own contribution; not the maintainer’s verification.

The declared network-off check runs `npm run compile-typescript && npm run test-unit` on node:22-bookworm after a disclosed online install. It does not run lint, type-check, or the full upstream CI gates.
